pieces.title: Verse I — [Song Title]
pieces.text:
*Replace this with your actual lyrics or poetry.*
A line that burns on the way down,
another that sits in your teeth.
*The chorus comes when you least expect it,*
everything you swallowed underneath.

pieces.title: Excerpt — [Poem / Song]
pieces.text:
Drop in a second piece here —
*a verse, a fragment, a line*
that represents your voice.
This space is yours to fill.
